verses.text: Uz gamah Job kici min nei mi khat a om hi. Tua mipa a paubaanglo, a thutang, Pasian a zahtak mi khat hi a, amah in gamtat hoihlo peuhmah pel hi
Amah in tapa sagih leh tanu thum nei hi
Amah in tuu tul sagih, kalaoh tul thum, bawngtal kap za nga, leh nasem tampi tak a nei hi. Tua ahih manin nisuahna gam sungah Job a haupen khat ahi hi
Ama tapate in inn khat panin inn khatah a ban banin pawi bawlin pai kawikawi uh a, tua pawi a siim dingin a sanggam numei thumte uh zong a sam kawikawi uh hi

Tua banga a pawi bawl uh gual khat a kikhit ciangin Job in a tapate samin amaute sian'suah a, zingsangin tho baihin a ta phazah tawh kizui-in meihal biakna a pia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Job in, “Ka tate khialin, a lungsim sung uhah Pasian samsia khathei ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Tu-a bangin Job in hih tawntung hi
Ni khat ni-in Topa' omna-ah vantung mite hong pai uh a, tuate lakah Satan zong hong kihel hi
Topa in Satan kiangah, “Koi pana hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Satan in Topa dawngin, “Leitung khempeuh a lu pan a taw dong vak kawikawi-in ka va phehlehna mun panin ka hong pai hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah, “Ka nasem Job na phawkkha hiam? A paubaanglo, a thutang, Pasian zahtakin gamtat hoihlo a pel amah tawh a kibang midang leitungah na mu kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Satan in Topa dawngin, “Job in Pasian hong mawk zahtak ahi hiam
Amah leh a innkuan leh a neihsate khempeuh na hutna-in a kimkotah dai khan hilo na hi hiam? Ama hihna khempeuhah thupha na pia a, genzawh lohin ama neihsa pung hi
Ahi zongin na khut zanin ama neihsa khempeuh suksak lecin na maitang mahmahah nang hong samsia pah ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah, “En in, ama neihsa khempeuh na khutsungah kong ap hi; ahi zongin amah taktak ahih leh na su kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa' omna panin Satan a paikhia hi
Ni khat, a tapate leh a tanute in a u pen uh inn-ah an ne zu ne-in om uh hi
Kamtai khat Job kiangah hong tungin, “Bawngtalte in lo kho-in, tuate gei-ah late gamta uh hi
Tua laitakin Seba mite hong pai-in ganhingte hong sut a, namsau tawh gancingte thatkhin uh hi. Hih thu a hong zasak thei dingin kei bek kong suakta hi,” a ci hi

Amah in a thugen a khit ma-in kamtai dang khat hong tungin, “Vantung panin keek hong kia a, tuute leh tuucingte kha-in kangtum uh hi. Hih thu nang kiangah a hong ko thei dingin kei bek kong suakta hi,” a ci hi

Tuapa in a thugen a khit ma-in kamtai dang khat hong tung leuleu-in, “Khaldea mite hon thum in kalaohte hong sut a, namsau tawh kalaoh tung tuangte khempeuh that hi. Hih thu nang kiangah a hong ko thei dingin kei bek kong suakta hi,” a ci hi
Amah in a thugen a khit ma-in kamtai dang khat hong tung leuleu a, “Na tapate leh na tanute a u pen uh inn-ah an ne zu ne-in om uh hi
Tua laitakin sehnel gam panin huihpi pingpei hong nungin a inn mutpai-in na tate denglum hi. Nang kiangah hih thu a hong ko thei dingin kei bek kong suakta hi,” a ci hi
Hih thu a zak ciangin Job dahlua-in a puan balkek a, a sam met khia-in leilakah bok sukin Pasian a bia hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka nu sung panin guaktangin ka suak a, guaktang mahin ka ciahkik ding hi. Topa in hong pia a, Topa mah in hong lakik hi. Topa' min kiphat ta hen,” a ci hi
Hih thu khempeuhah Job khiallo a, Pasian zong mawhsaklo hi.
